name: Atlanta (United States)

colors.symbolism: the gold municipal seal and phoenix emblem

description: A navy-blue field bearing the gold municipal seal of Atlanta at the centre, depicting a phoenix rising from flames with the Latin motto 'Resurgens' and the date 1847.
history: Atlanta's official municipal flag bears the city seal, whose phoenix-and-'Resurgens' device dates to the post-Civil-War rebuilding of the city; the seal was adopted in 1887 and is the city's longstanding civic emblem.

features.role: Seal of the City of Atlanta with the phoenix and motto 'Resurgens'
features.symbolism: A phoenix rising from flames symbolising Atlanta's rebuilding after its destruction in the 1864 Civil War; encircled by the city's name, the founding date 1847 and the Latin motto 'Resurgens' ('rising again').
